zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet於1198年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓時，他的父親Nicholas de Poyntz II36歲，母親Julianna de Bardolf25歲。他於1217年3月23日與Hawise Malet在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1220年4月4日在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年22歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet于1198年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托金頓时，他的父亲Nicholas de Poyntz II36岁，母亲Julianna de Bardolf25岁。他于1217年3月23日与Hawise Malet在英国薩默塞特加里 馬利特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1220年4月4日在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年22岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet was born in 1198, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Nicholas de Poyntz II, was 36 and his mother, Julianna de Bardolf, was 25. He married Hawise Malet on 23 March 1217, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 April 1220, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, at the age of 22, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet est né en 1198, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Poyntz II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Julianna de Bardolf, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Malet le 23 mars 1217, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1220, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterré à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Iron Acton, South Gloucestershire Unitar: Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet 1198 in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Poyntz II 36 und seine Mutter Julianna de Bardolf 25. Er hat am 23. März 1217 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England Hawise Malet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 4. April 1220 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England und wurde in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Hawise Malet il 23 marzo 1217, nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 aprile 1220, nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolto a Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Malletが1198年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Poyntz IIは36歳，母Julianna de Bardolfは25歳であった。1217年3月23日にイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットでHawise Maletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1220年4月4日にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで22歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet(이)가 1198년 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Poyntz II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianna de Bardolf(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1217년 3월 23일 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 Hawise Malet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1220년 4월 4일 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet nasceu em 1198, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Poyntz II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Julianna de Bardolf, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Malet em 23 de março de 1217, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1220, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 22 anos, e foi sepultado em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet родился в 1198 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Poyntz II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Julianna de Bardolf, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Malet 23 марта 1217 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 апреля 1220 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 22 лет и был похоронен в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Hawise Malet el 23 de marzo de 1217, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de abril de 1220, en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultado en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
